special_mechanics.name: Double Jump
special_mechanics.description: Chronos and Sarah can perform a double jump ability

special_mechanics.name: Wall Jump
special_mechanics.description: Chronos and Sarah can perform wall jumps

special_mechanics.name: Air Slam Throw
special_mechanics.description: Proud Cragger possesses an airslam throw that does severe damage

special_mechanics.name: Mount/Bizarrian Riding
special_mechanics.description: Player can ride hybrid snail-ostrich creatures (Bizarrians) with different attack types

special_mechanics.name: Magic System

tier_notes: Tier 3 empirical/qualitative data. No precise physics parameters documented in available sources. Game is a side-scrolling beat-em-up with character-specific movement abilities (double jump, wall jump) but exact numerical physics values are not available.
